narrative:
## Year 26

### Events
- [GRN] **resource_strike**: Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.
- [GRN] **breakthrough**: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
- [YEL] **dust_storm**: The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.

**Activity:** mediate(3), hoard(2), explore(2), cooperate(1), rest(1)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 77%

diaries.text:
**Pax Stone** (earth/judge) — Year 26

Another year. We are still here.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
We did something impossible today.

*— Pax Stone, judge*

**Aura Kai** (air/philosopher) — Year 26

The air in me stirs with possibility.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
We did something impossible today.

*— Aura Kai, philosopher*

**Rust Veg** (earth/sentinel) — Year 26

Another year. We are still here.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
We did something impossible today.

*— Rust Veg, sentinel*
